display_text: Minotaur Horn, Tier 5: Neutral item providing the active ability Lesser Avatar. Applies a basic dispel, grants 50% magic resistance, and immunity to pure and reflected damage for 2 seconds. During this brief duration, negative effects from enemy spells have no effect. This creates a powerful, short-term defensive window against heavy magic burst and dispellable disables. Stats: CD: 40s, Duration: 2s, Magic Resistance: 50%.
